measures.title: Public Safety and Governmental Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Raises Bremerton's regular property tax rate by $0.48 to a total authorized rate of $1.95 per $1,000 of assessed value for 2027, with the 2027 levy amount used to calculate subsequent levies for public safety and governmental services.
measures.cost_line: Increases the city property tax rate by $0.48 per $1,000 of assessed value for 2027 collections.

taxes.basis: YES raises a city property tax levy for public safety and governmental services.

measures.jurisdiction: Kitsap County Fire Protection District No. 18
measures.title: Bonds for Fire and Emergency Response Facilities, Vehicles and Equipment
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes Poulsbo Fire to acquire, construct, and renovate firefighting and emergency response facilities, vehicles, and equipment, issue up to $7.64 million in general obligation bonds maturing within 6 years, and levy annual excess property taxes to repay the bonds.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes up to $7,640,000 in bonds repaid by annual excess property taxes.

taxes.basis: YES authorizes bond debt and excess property taxes for fire and emergency response facilities, vehicles, and equipment.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Continues North Mason Regional Fire Authority's emergency medical services property tax levy for six consecutive years beginning in 2027.
measures.cost_line: Continues a regular EMS property tax levy of $0.50 or less per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES continues a property tax levy for emergency medical services.
